raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "exhortation urging the soul toward self-abasement while evoking the finitude of any future self-regard",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the soul possesses a limited temporal window in which self-respect remains possible",
    "self-contempt is presently advisable or necessary",
    "a transition from potential respect to its absence is imminent"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a compact meditation on urgency and self-relation, using repetition and temporal contrast to heighten affective force",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the reader seeks evocative language to prompt humility, mortality awareness, or ethical self-scrutiny within a literary or contemplative practice",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is read as a literal prescription for psychological harm rather than as figurative counsel on the brevity of self-regard"
}
